mechanism: If hyperscalers breach kill-zone thresholds and retrench capex, the Kalecki mechanism transmits the investment reduction directly to aggregate profits, making a sector-level stress event into a macro event.
regime_dependence: The transmission strength depends on the fiscal deficit level. With deficit at 6-7% GDP, a 25% capex cut (~$60-75B) is material but not dominant. If fiscal consolidation narrows the deficit, the same capex cut becomes proportionally larger.
